title: Der Auschwitz-Mythos - Legende oder Wirklichkeit
description: Der Auschwitz-Mythos - Legende oder Wirklichkeit is a historical revisionism / holocaust denial by Wilhelm Stäglich. Confiscated by the Stuttgart Regional Court in May 1982.
descriptionParagraphs: Der Auschwitz-Mythos - Legende oder Wirklichkeit is a historical revisionism / holocaust denial by Wilhelm Stäglich. Confiscated by the Stuttgart Regional Court in May 1982.

The surviving record is interesting because it shows how even ordinary-looking books can acquire a charged political afterlife. As a historical revisionism / holocaust denial, it can be read not only for subject matter but for the way form, tone, and circulation make a text feel dangerous, intimate, or politically usable to anxious officials.

It also matters as part of a wider censorship history in List of books confiscated for violating Criminal Code 86, 86a, 130 or 130a. The present page is a dossier starter built from source-tracked ban records; the surviving note currently says: Confiscated by the Stuttgart Regional Court in May 1982. Unofficial title translation: The Auschwitz Myth - Legend or Reality More publication history, translations, and close reading can be added later.

In the current dossier, the main state objections cluster around political sensitivity.
